writing.task1:
Dear Customer Support
I ordered [Order #12345] on 17/8, but it arrived late ( expected 15/8, arrived 17/8) and damaged (cracked screen, scratches). The delivery address was 81 Bình Phú.
I can provide photos and receipt
Please refund or replace the item and confirm by email.
Thank you
writing.task2: I agree that public transport should be free in city centres during rush hours. Reducing traffic congestion  is the main benefit, as more people would choose buses and trains instead of driving. For example, when Paris offered discounted or free transit on busy day, many commuters left their cars at home, making streets less crowded. Some may argue this could reduce transport revenue, but increased ridership and lower congestion could offset costs through savings on road maintenance and pollution reduction
writing.task3: The bar chart shows that all four learning methods led to a steady increase in new words learned over four weeks. Flashcards was the strongest performer, rising from 18 words in w1 to 23 in w4, while the Conversation Club was the weakest, increasing from 10 to 17 words. The difference may be due to Flashcards providing focused, repetitive practice, whereas the Conversation Club relies more on spontaneous use, which may introduce fewer new wưord
